---
title: "Mapping Data with Tidycensus"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}


library(tidyverse)
install.packages("tidycensus")
library(tidycensus)

census_api_key("1ac759ea17827990b6b83d2ea74559a25f20a38f", overwrite = TRUE)







```

```         
```

```{}
```

```         

```

```{r}


```

```{r}
usethis::edit_r_environ()

CENSUS_API_KEY='1ac759ea17827990b6b83d2ea74559a25f20a38f'

```

```{r}
age20 <- get_decennial(geography = "state", 
                       variables = "P13_001N", 
                       year = 2020,
                       sumfile = "dhc")

head(age20)
```

```{}
```
